lede: A look at June 1 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Technoblade and Amy Schumer, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Sinking of Dongfang zhi Xing
events.desc: A ship carrying 458 people capsizes in the Yangtze river in China's Hubei province, killing 442 people.

events.title: 2011 Springfield tornado
events.desc: A rare tornado outbreak occurs in New England; a strong EF3 tornado strikes Springfield, Massachusetts, during the event, killing four people.

events.title: 2008 Universal Studios fire
events.desc: A fire on the back lot of Universal Studios breaks out, destroying the attraction King Kong Encounter and a large archive of master tapes for music and film, the full extent of which was not revealed until 2019.

events.title: Cyclone Gonu
events.desc: Cyclone Gonu develops from an area of convection in the Arabian Sea, becoming the worst recorded natural disaster in Oman.

events.title: Intermediate-Range Nuclear Forces Treaty
events.desc: The Intermediate-Range Nuclear Forces Treaty comes into effect.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: The Battle of Crete ends as Crete capitulates to Germany.

events.title: World War I
events.desc: World War I: Western Front: Battle of Belleau Wood: Allied Forces under John J. Pershing and James Harbord engage Imperial German Forces under Wilhelm, German Crown Prince.

events.title: Revolution of the Ganhadores
events.desc: The Revolution of the Ganhadores begins in Salvador, Bahia, Brazil.

events.title: War of 1812
events.desc: War of 1812: U.S. President James Madison asks the Congress to declare war on the United Kingdom.

events.title: Tennessee
events.desc: Tennessee is admitted as the 16th state of the United States.

deaths.text: Werner Forssmann, German physician and academic, Nobel Prize laureate
Sir Alfred Rawlinson, 3rd Baronet, English colonel and polo player

observances.text: Children's Day (International), and its related observances: The Day of Protection of Children Rights (Armenia)
Children's Day (International), and its related observances: Mothers' and Children's Day (Mongolia)
Christian feast day: Annibale Maria di Francia
